title: Component Behavioral Contract
description: NON-ENFORCING STUB. This project intentionally has no machine validation — the consumer is an LLM, so contracts are authored, not validated. The real guideline is the annotated template (templates/contract.template.json), the section policy (docs/requirements.md), and the authoring skill (.claude/skills/component-contract/SKILL.md). Visual details (colors, sizes, typography, spacing) are never valid contract content.

x-guideline.canonical_sections_note: One concept, one section: composition is the single structural section (no anatomy); state_machine holds all transitions and named operations (no separate transitions/interactions); triggers cover all runtime interactions (no interactivity).
